candidates.title: Project Manager
candidates.jd_text: Job Title: Project Manager About the Role We are seeking an experienced Project Manager to lead and deliver medium to large-scale work packages within a dynamic and fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of managing projects using Agile methodologies, ensuring timely delivery, and driving collaboration across cross-functional teams. Key Responsibilities Plan, execute, and deliver projects using Agile principles. Manage medium to large work packages from initiation to completion. Facilitate sprint planning, daily stand-ups, retrospectives, and other Agile ceremonies. Collaborate with stakeholders to define scope, priorities, and deliverables. Monitor project progress, identify risks, and implement mitigation strategies. Ensure alignment with organizational goals and maintain transparency through reporting. Develop and maintain project documentation, including roadmaps, timelines, and status reports. Coordinate with product owners and technical teams to ensure backlog refinement and prioritization. Manage dependencies across multiple teams and projects. Drive continuous improvement by analyzing metrics and implementing best practices. Ensure compliance with organizational standards and governance frameworks. Mentor and coach team members on Agile principles and practices. Manage stakeholder expectations and facilitate effective communication across all levels. Qualifications & Experience 3–5 years of experience in Agile project managemen

Effectively manage client needs, coordinating internal resources or expanding external resources to solve issues and push projects forward. 3. Being deeply involved into the offline and online project execution. In the mean time, contral the progression and outcomes of projects, communicate with clients, suppliers, kols, medias, celebrity on progress, control timelines, and ensure effective project advancement. 4. candidates.title: Product Owner [Talents Bench]
candidates.jd_text: Metal Toad is an Advanced AWS Consulting Partner that empowers organizations to innovate through artificial intelligence, cloud migration, cost optimization, and application modernization. We help our customers with their cloud adoption by providing architecture, migration, optimization, machine learning, and even 24/7 support. We are a professional services firm providing services in software engineering and the cloud. We do Technical consulting, Programming & Quality Assurance, DevOps, Applications, UX, Product management, and Project management. Metal Toad is a fully remote company, offering all team members the ability to work from home. Although Metal Toad is a remote company, we are currently seekingcontractorsresiding in Brazilfor this position. Compensation will be made inBrazilian Reais (R$), following the local currency of the country where the position is located. Due to legal limitations, we areunable to sponsor any type of visa. To apply for this position, please submit yourresume in English as a PDF. Job Description The mission for this role is to guide our clients to the best strategic product decisions for their unique organization and business goals. Product Owners at Metal Toad connect and translate between client business needs and technology solutions. You speak business values and are fluent in user stories. You bring a global view of development processes to your work, assisting in the creation of strategic vision and program development. Responsibil

Zakres obowiązków Zarządzanie złożonymi projektami IT end-to-end Odpowiedzialność za realizację projektów w zakresie budżetu, harmonogramu i zakresu Koordynacja współpracy z dostawcami wewnętrznymi i zewnętrznymi oraz udział w procesach przetargowych Identyfikacja i zarządzanie zależnościami między projektami i programami Zarządzanie relacjami z interesariuszami biznesowymi i technicznymi Wsparcie zespołów w pracy zgodnie z frameworkiem Scrum i praktykami Agile Budowanie efektywności zespołów poprzez usuwanie przeszkód i zarządzanie ryzykami Wspieranie Product Ownera w definiowaniu celów i dekompozycji pracy Facylitacja wydarzeń Scrum oraz rozwój efektywnośc
